concepts.headline: Seven free Google AI courses with certificates.
concepts.subtext: Google is offering free AI courses across writing, research, data, and app building.
data_points: AI Fundamentals: Build a foundation for professional AI use.
AI for Brainstorming: Evaluate and prioritize ideas creatively.
AI for Research: Research faster and summarize sources with Gemini.
AI for Writing: Turn meeting notes into clear summaries.
AI for Content Creation: Generate images and videos using Gemini.
AI for Data Analysis: Track metrics and measure performance.
AI for App Building: Build a web app with AI, no code needed.
concepts.layout_description: Stacked list layout with header block at top-left. Seven numbered rows below, each with a square number badge on the left, bold course name, and one-line descriptor. Left-aligned throughout with 60px left padding. Particle dots scattered in upper-right quadrant at low opacity. FLYWHEEL watermark behind content at opacity 0.03.

layout_spec.accent_placement: 2px warm sand bar beneath headline, fading right
layout_spec.whitespace_distribution: right 15% reserved for particle motif, top 12% for header block
layout_spec.emphasis_area: numbered list rows occupying left 85% of canvas

concepts.color_usage: Black #000000 for headlines and course names, #6b7a7c for descriptors, #d7c8af for number badge borders and accent bar, #ffffff background.
concepts.reasoning: The post is a clean sequential list of seven courses making numbered_list_graphic the natural and highest-confidence fit. The stacked rows allow each course to breathe while the square number badges reinforce Flywheel's square geometry signature. The sparse right margin preserves negative space and editorial restraint.
visualization_goals: Show all 7 free Google AI courses as a structured visual list with their names and one-line descriptions
Highlight the progression from foundational AI knowledge to advanced application building across the 7 courses
Categorize the courses by use case type (Creative, Analytical, Technical, Communication) to show breadth of AI skills covered
Emphasize the zero-cost, certificate-included value proposition of the Google AI learning pathway

concepts.headline: Seven free Google AI courses with certificates.
concepts.subtext: From foundations to app building, Google covers the full AI skill stack at no cost.
data_points: Fundamentals: Core AI concepts for professional use.
Brainstorming: AI as a creative idea engine.
Research: Faster sourcing with Gemini and NotebookLM.
Writing: Meeting notes into polished summaries.
Content Creation: Images and video via Gemini.
Data Analysis: Clean data, track metrics, measure results.
App Building: Working web app, zero code required.
concepts.layout_description: Left-anchored feature list with a bold header block at top spanning 55% of canvas width. Seven feature rows below with a thin warm sand left-border accent per row, bold category label, and short descriptor in secondary gray. Right 30% of canvas is empty save for a faint particle network. Warm gradient footer at bottom 80px.

layout_spec.accent_placement: left-edge 2px vertical bar in #d7c8af per row
layout_spec.whitespace_distribution: right 30% open with particle dots, bottom 80px warm gradient
layout_spec.emphasis_area: feature rows in left 65% of canvas

concepts.color_usage: Black #000000 for category labels, #6b7a7c for descriptors, #d7c8af for row accent borders and footer gradient, #ffffff background.
concepts.reasoning: Feature list framing emphasizes the practical skill category per course rather than a step-by-step sequence, letting each row read as a standalone capability unlock. The left accent bar per row is a clean Flywheel motif that adds visual rhythm without clutter.
visualization_goals: Show all 7 free Google AI courses as a structured visual list with their names and one-line descriptions
Highlight the progression from foundational AI knowledge to advanced application building across the 7 courses
Categorize the courses by use case type (Creative, Analytical, Technical, Communication) to show breadth of AI skills covered
Emphasize the zero-cost, certificate-included value proposition of the Google AI learning pathway

concepts.headline: Google AI courses cover four skill domains.
concepts.subtext: Seven free, certificate-backed courses spanning creative, analytical, technical, and communication skills.
concepts.layout_description: Left-anchored hero layout. Headline and subtext occupy top-left. Horizontal bar chart sits below spanning left 60% of canvas. Each bar rendered in black with DM Mono labels showing course count. Right 35% of canvas reserved as negative space with faint particle network. FLYWHEEL watermark at opacity 0.03 behind chart.

layout_spec.stat_position: bar chart at center-left 45% from top
layout_spec.whitespace_distribution: right 35% open, top 20% header, bottom 15% footer
layout_spec.emphasis_area: horizontal bar chart rows in center-left zone

concepts.color_usage: Black #000000 for bars and headline, #6b7a7c for axis labels, DM Mono for value labels, #d7c8af for accent underline, #ffffff background.
concepts.reasoning: The categorical breakdown visualizes the breadth of the course offering in a way a list cannot, showing balanced coverage across skill types. However this reframes the post's content rather than reflecting it directly, making it a secondary option.
visualization_goals: Show all 7 free Google AI courses as a structured visual list with their names and one-line descriptions
Highlight the progression from foundational AI knowledge to advanced application building across the 7 courses
Categorize the courses by use case type (Creative, Analytical, Technical, Communication) to show breadth of AI skills covered
Emphasize the zero-cost, certificate-included value proposition of the Google AI learning pathway

selection_reasoning: Concept 0 is the strongest match because the post is literally a numbered seven-item list, making numbered_list_graphic the most direct and editorially faithful representation. It preserves the sequential logic of the original content, allows each course to be legible at a glance, and the stacked row structure with square number badges and generous negative space perfectly embodies Flywheel's Swiss-design restraint. No reframing or abstraction is needed: the content structure and the modality are identical.
